contacts.name: Christine Cole
contacts.title: Business Advisor – Portland (Cumberland County)
contacts.relevance: 2025 State Star recipient. Advises cannabis entrepreneurs in Maine's largest market. SBDC advisors serve regulated industries despite federal restrictions. Key for connecting with Portland dispensary owners and aspiring licensees.

contacts.name: Patrick Woodcock
contacts.title: President & CEO
contacts.relevance: Leads Maine's largest business association (thousands of members). Chamber hosts cannabis working group and business events. High-value for sponsorship, presenting, and reaching Chamber member businesses.

contacts.name: Hannah LaClaire
contacts.title: Staff Writer – Housing, Real Estate, Cannabis, Health Care
contacts.relevance: Active cannabis beat reporter covering Maine's legal market, regulatory changes, and industry trends. Published 5+ cannabis stories in 2025. Direct email for story tips, data requests, and expert quotes.

contacts.name: Peter Van Allen
contacts.title: Editor
contacts.relevance: Maine's premier business news editor. Covers cannabis industry regularly (plateau sales, market data). Already in existing contacts — continue nurturing relationship.

contacts.name: Jonathan Trumper
contacts.title: State Director
contacts.relevance: SCORE Maine state director (promoted from chapter chair July 2024). SCORE mentors advise entrepreneurs starting cannabis businesses. 135 mentors statewide. Key for referral network and workshop promotion.

contacts.name: Matt Hawes
contacts.title: Vice President
contacts.relevance: MCIA VP and founding member. Active in policy efforts and quoted in recent Press Herald coverage on federal reclassification (Dec 2025). Key industry association leader for outreach and citations.

contacts.name: Brendan Craig
contacts.title: Business Advisor
contacts.relevance: Maine SBDC advisor on the team page. SBDC statewide network covers all Maine counties including York, Androscoggin, Franklin, Oxford. Additional SBDC contact for regional cannabis entrepreneur outreach.

contacts.name: Alexis Soucy
contacts.title: Director of Media & Stakeholder Relations
contacts.relevance: OCP media director — official channel for state data, policy updates, and regulatory news. Key for obtaining official Maine cannabis sales data and market statistics for citation.

contacts.name: Biguita Hernandez-Smith
contacts.title: Economic Development Officer
contacts.organization: City of Bangor – Community & Economic Development
contacts.relevance: Bangor's economic development officer covering the Bangor region. Cannabis businesses operate in Bangor metro area. Local development corporation contact for regional cannabis market reach.

contacts.name: Anne Krieg
contacts.title: Director of Development
contacts.organization: City of Bangor – Community & Economic Development
contacts.relevance: Bangor's development director. City of Bangor approved adult-use cannabis businesses. Key contact for Bangor region economic development and cannabis business support.

contacts.name: Brandon Mazer
contacts.title: Attorney – Cannabis & Craft Beverage
contacts.relevance: Maine attorney at Perkins Thompson with cannabis licensing and regulatory expertise. Represents cannabis clients in licensing, compliance, and commercial transactions. Key referral source for legal perspective citations.

contacts.name: Andrew Kraus
contacts.title: Business and Intellectual Property Attorney
contacts.relevance: Portland-based business attorney with cannabis clients. Opticliff Law specializes in regulated industries. Additional legal contact for cannabis business attorney citations and referrals.

contacts.name: Ezekiel Callanan
contacts.title: Business Attorney
contacts.relevance: Opticliff Law attorney with collaborative, business-minded approach to cannabis counseling. Maine-based legal contact for cannabis business guidance and compliance expertise.

contacts.name: Glenn Peterson
contacts.title: President
contacts.relevance: MeADO president since 2012 — longest-standing medical cannabis operator association in Maine. Early-market operator network. Key association contact for legacy medical cannabis perspective citations.

contacts.name: Dana Lynch
contacts.title: Co-Founder
contacts.relevance: Maine-based cannabis consulting and brand development. Works with cultivators and retailers on branding and market positioning. Newer Maine cannabis brand strategist — outreach target for content partnership.

contacts.name: Mark Ellis
contacts.title: Membership Director
contacts.relevance: Chamber membership director — handles membership inquiries and can connect to cannabis member businesses. Direct contact for sponsorship opportunities and Chamber event access.

contacts.name: John Massey
contacts.title: Corporate Services Officer – Cannabis Sector
contacts.relevance: Leads Bangor Savings Bank cannabis banking division. CPA with cannabis sector expertise. Already in contacts — continue nurturing for cannabis finance content and lead referrals.

contacts.name: Katy Kelleher
contacts.title: Author – High Country Cannabis Section
contacts.relevance: Writes Maine cannabis editorial content for The Maine Mag's High Country section. Lifestyle cannabis coverage. Key for content partnership and reaching different audience segment than business press.

contacts.name: David O'Brien
contacts.title: Director
contacts.relevance: Weed Chamber of Commerce director. National cannabis trade organization contact for cross-promotion and national cannabis networking opportunities.

contacts.name: Elisa C. Ellis
contacts.title: Director of Media & Stakeholder Relations (formerly)
contacts.relevance: Former OCP media director, now licensed Maine attorney with Office of Cannabis Policy background. Key regulatory insider perspective for cannabis business guidance. LinkedIn suggests she may have returned to private practice.
